scripts.dev:web:e2e:clean: for p in 43173; do lsof -ti tcp:$p | xargs kill 2>/dev/null || true; done && bun run dev:web:e2e
scripts.dev:infra:e2e: ALCHEMY_PASSWORD=e2e-local-password ALCHEMY_E2E=1 ALCHEMY_SKIP_WEB=1 STAGE=e2e bun run --cwd ../.. dev:server
scripts.dev:infra:e2e:clean: for p in 43100 43101 43102; do lsof -ti tcp:$p | xargs kill 2>/dev/null || true; done && turbo run db:reset:local --filter=@my-app/db && bun run dev:infra:e2e
scripts.test:e2e: for p in 43173 43100 43101 43102; do lsof -ti tcp:$p | xargs kill 2>/dev/null || true; done && PLAYWRIGHT_REUSE_SERVERS=0 playwright test -c playwright.config.ts
scripts.test:e2e:ui: for p in 43173 43100 43101 43102; do lsof -ti tcp:$p | xargs kill 2>/dev/null || true; done && PLAYWRIGHT_REUSE_SERVERS=0 playwright test -c playwright.config.ts --ui
